brief.subject: empty night apartment hallway seen from inside a door peephole, rain streaks, wet reflective floor, locked doors, no people, no silhouettes
brief.usage: Godot game 16:9 peephole background for 猫眼之后
brief.mood: psychological horror, quiet dread, suspicious stillness
style: polished anime horror game background, cinematic wide 16:9 composition, fisheye peephole feeling, CRT grain, clean focal area, no readable text
palette: sickly green, cold cyan, oxidized red accents, near black

model.quality_prompt: masterpiece, best quality, newest, highres, polished anime illustration, clean linework
model.default_negative: low quality, worst quality, normal quality, blurry, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature, unwanted text, logo, bad anatomy, extra fingers, malformed hands

workflow.notes: Native-node WebUI-like chain: txt2img, LoRA insertion, latent Hires.fix, second denoise pass, VAE decode, final pixel resize, save.

positive_prompt: empty night apartment hallway seen from inside a door peephole, rain streaks, wet reflective floor, locked doors, no people, no silhouettes, polished anime horror game background, cinematic wide 16:9 composition, fisheye peephole feeling, CRT grain, clean focal area, no readable text, palette of sickly green, cold cyan, oxidized red accents, near black, psychological horror, quiet dread, suspicious stillness, spacious background, balanced negative space, subtle details, masterpiece, best quality, newest, highres, polished anime illustration, clean linework
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, watermark, signature, readable text, logo, busy foreground, distracting focal object, worst quality, normal quality, jpeg artifacts, unwanted text, bad anatomy, extra fingers, malformed hands, person, girl, character, human figure, sign text

workflow_safety.lora_policy: no final game LoRA; prompt-only SDXL txt2img source asset
workflow_safety.hires_fix: first-pass denoise may be 1.0; audited hires parameters are hires_scale, hires_steps, and hires_denoise
